section_name: Texas Ranger Glenn Elliott Memorial Highway
text:
(a) Spur 63 in Gregg County between its intersection with U.S. Highway 80 and Spur 502 is designated as the Texas Ranger Glenn Elliott Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Texas Ranger Glenn Elliott Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.106 (Sgt) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(49), eff. September 1, 2017.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.122 — Texas Ranger Glenn Elliott Memorial Highway

(a) Spur 63 in Gregg County between its intersection with U.S. Highway 80 and Spur 502 is designated as the Texas Ranger Glenn Elliott Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Texas Ranger Glenn Elliott Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.106 (Sgt) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(49), eff. September 1, 2017.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 566 (H.B.2540), Sec. 1, eff. June 16, 2015.*
